channel.title: Sample Packs on Puget Audio
channel.description: Recent content in Sample Packs on Puget Audio

item.title: Puget Lasers Vol. 1
item.description:
128 laser one-shots captured straight off a Moog DFAM — the all-analog semi-modular percussion synthesizer. No software. No digital oscillators. Pure analog signal path from start to finish.

What’s Inside

Laser Zips

Short, punchy laser bursts with tight transients. Perfect for percussive accents, UI sounds, and rhythmic layering:

  • Quick Zips — 24 fast, snappy laser bursts
  • Rising Zips — 16 upward pitch sweeps with analog character
  • Falling Zips — 16 descending zips with natural decay

Laser Zaps

Harder-hitting laser impacts with more body and resonance:

item.title: DnB Essentials Vol. 1
item.description:
DnB Essentials Vol. 1

A comprehensive drum & bass sample pack built from the ground up in our Seattle studio. Every sound recorded through real analog signal chains — no recycled loops, no generic presets.

What’s Inside

Drum Breaks & One-Shots

Tight, punchy breaks and individual hits designed for modern DnB production:

  • Kick Drums — 40+ kicks from deep subs to punchy mid-range
  • Snares & Claps — 60+ snares, rim shots, and layered claps
  • Hi-Hats — 50+ hats, rides, and metallic textures
  • Full Breaks — 30+ processed breakbeat loops at 170-178 BPM
  • Percussion — 40+ shakers, tambourines, and ghost hits

Bass

Sub-frequency weight and mid-range aggression:
